title: DLSA Thoothukudi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 30 Para Legal Volunteer Posts
description: District Legal Services Authority (DLSA) Thoothukudi has declared the latest job notification for 2026. To fill up the 30 vacancies for Para Legal Volunteers Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass, Any Degree, or Diploma can grab this chance and apply for the DLSA Thoothukudi Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can app...
